case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. VS. STEVEN C OJALA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OJALA, STEVEN C $10,019.67 PRINCIPAL, $392.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,412.17, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. SERVED MAY-24-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OJALA, STEVEN C

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT OJALA, STEVEN C DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-25-2010
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-15-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-15-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $392.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $1,738.00 AS TO DEFENDANT OJALA, STEVEN C
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
APPLICATION /DECLARATION PROPOSED ORDER REGARDING USE OF COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS PURSUANT TO EVID 1562 AND 1271 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT OJALA, STEVEN C
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE
WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
